{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Jade Remnant
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Jade Remnant]] is compared to the half-manifested hammer.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] carries [[Jade]] [[Remnants]] with [[White Fox]]-compatible [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
